Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Queen Leah I]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Leah I is the current Queen in her 1st year of reign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — It is the 1st Year in the Reign of Queen Leah I.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The current reign is the 1st Year in the Reign of Queen Leah I.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Leah I is the current reigning Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — It is the 1st Year in the Reign of Queen Leah I.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — It is the 1st Year in the Reign of Queen Leah I.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — It is the 1st Year in the Reign of Queen Leah I.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — The current reign is the 1st Year in the Reign of Queen Leah I.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
